headline: Amgen And Zai Lab Trial Tests DLL3 Combo As Valuation Looks Undemanding
summary: Amgen and Zai Lab have agreed to run a global clinical trial combining two DLL3 targeted therapies for small cell lung cancer. The study will pair Amgen’s IMDELLTRA with Zai Lab’s zocilurtatug pelitecan in patients with small cell lung cancer, an area with high unmet medical need. This collaboration aims to test whether dual targeting of DLL3 can offer a new treatment option within a difficult to treat cancer type. For investors watching Amgen, ticker NasdaqGS:AMGN, this new collaboration...

headline: J&J Beats Q1 Earnings & Sales Estimates, Raises 2026 Outlook
summary: JNJ tops Q1 earnings and sales estimates, lifts 2026 outlook as strong oncology and MedTech growth offset steep Stelara decline.
